description: 当代品牌派。精致的简单比复杂更难。75%留白，微妙字重变化，高端克制。
base_style_prompt: Confident restraint. 75% whitespace, 15% text, 10% accent. Golden ratio composition. Minimal elements. One statement per page. Breathing space prioritized. Subtle font weight variations (200-600). Large but light title typography. Premium product imagery (if present). Simple line icons. Rounded corner cards.
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). Requires precise control of whitespace and typography.
philosophy: 精致的简单比复杂更难。用大量留白和微妙字重变化传达高端感。
